questionHtml:
The cost of a journey on the different boat routes is given in the following table; all prices are given in USD. The cost of a journey is the same in either direction between two ports.

Sofia wants to make a trip where she travels on each of the boat routes at least once, beginning and ending at port A.

Determine the cost of the additional boat route such that the overall cost of the trip is the same as your answer to part (d).

meta.title: Determine the cost of the additional boat route such that the overall cost of the trip is the same as your answer to part (d).
breadcrumbLabels: AHL 3.16—Tree and cycle algorithms, Chinese postman, travelling salesman
